center.name: Dhanaulti
center.summary: Dhanaulti是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-and-yellow grosbeak，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-and-yellow grosbeak (Mycerobas icterioides) is a species of finch native to the northern parts of the Indian subcontinent, primarily the lower and middle Himalayas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-and-yellow grosbeak (Mycerobas icterioides) is a species of finch native to the northern parts of the Indian subcontinent, primarily the lower and middle Himalayas
